articles.title: Europe to fill gaps left by US in Nato defence plans, Reuters reports
articles.summary: Europe to fill gaps left by US in Nato defence plans, Reuters reports Nato will announce that its European members have filled almost all gaps left by the US in the alliance’s defence plans at next week’s Ankara summit, Reuters reported on Wednesday, citing a Nato source. The main gap Nato is struggling to fill has been its strategic bombers, after the US said it will only provide one aircraft rather than two, the source said, speaking on condition of anonymity.

articles.title: Israeli strikes kill at least three in Gaza city
articles.summary: Israeli strikes kill at least three in Gaza city Wafa news agency reported two Israeli strikes that have left at least three dead and several critically injured in northern Gaza City on Wednesday. An Israeli combat drone struck near al-Helou Feil Station, killing three people, according to local sources. Several Palestinians were wounded in an earlier Israeli drone strike targeting a group of people near Dar al-Arqam School in the Sheikh Radwan neighbourhood. Eight Palestinians have been killed by Israel in the last 24 hours, and 26 others were admitted to Gaza hospitals, Wafa news reported.
